text.title: LlamaIndex — Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `llamaindex` must enforce. Verifiable at review time; failures gate the artifact.

rule.statement: Every answer carries source-citation metadata (node_id + source_path + char_range).
rule.rationale: Un-cited answers are unauditable and unsuitable for regulated or customer-facing use.

rule.statement: Default chunk_size=512, overlap=64; raise to 1024/128 for code, lower to 256/32 for chat logs.
rule.rationale: Wrong chunk size destroys retrieval quality independent of model.

rule.statement: Pin embedding model + dimension; never mix dimensions in one index.
rule.rationale: Mixed-dimension indexes fail or return garbage; embed-model drift requires re-index.

rule.statement: Use Workflow (async events) for multi-step / HITL flows; QueryEngine for single-shot RAG.
rule.rationale: Synchronous QueryEngine cannot pause/resume; Workflow can.

rule.statement: top_k=10 default with reranker (Cohere Rerank / bge-reranker); pure top_k=3 loses recall.
rule.rationale: Pure-vector top_k loses recall; rerank lifts precision at modest cost.

rule.statement: Ingestion pipeline is idempotent: identical source → identical nodes; use hash-based node IDs.
rule.rationale: Non-idempotent ingestion produces duplicate nodes and noisy retrieval.
